decision_from_branch_b: C - risk-only failed offline; request more/different labels from Model A
purpose: Targeted residual/risk enrichment for Branch B risk-only contextual model. This is not a generic larger batch request.

sampling_criteria.name: search_selected_high_regret_analogs
sampling_criteria.description: High-criticality production/self-play states where the current agent_search-selected option is later labelled high_regret_flag=1, especially when current_search_value and stronger_value disagree sharply.

sampling_criteria.name: safe_search_choice_false_positive_analogs
sampling_criteria.description: High-criticality states where agent_search selects the Teacher V2 best or acceptable option with low regret, but plausible sibling options are unacceptable; these calibrate the model away from blocking safe search choices.

sampling_criteria.name: near_miss_risk_boundary
sampling_criteria.description: States with high search/stronger variance, large delta_to_search magnitude, or hand/outcome disagreement where high_regret_flag is mixed among siblings.

why_requested: risk model predicted low risk for the selected option
risk intervention blocked the Teacher V2 best option and fell back to an unacceptable sibling
